
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Romelyn Barbadillo — Portfolio</title>
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;background:#2F4F4F;color:#f0ece4}
:root{
--gold:#d4a55a;--gold-light:#e8c98a;--gold-dark:#a07a30;
--cream:#f5efe3;--cream-muted:#c8bfae;
--accent:#7ecfb8;--accent-dark:#3a9e84;
--card:#3a5f5f;--card2:#476e6e;
}
.port{max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 1rem}
section{padding:3rem 0}
nav{position:sticky;top:0;background:#2a4848ee;border-bottom:1px solid #4a7070;z-index:100;padding:.65rem 0}
.nav-inner{max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem}
.nav-logo{font-size:15px;font-weight:500;color:var(--gold-light)}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.nav-links a{font-size:13px;color:var(--cream-muted);text-decoration:none;cursor:pointer}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--gold-light)}

.hero{padding:4rem 0 3rem;text-align:center}
.hero-avatar{width:160px;height:160px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;border:4px solid var(--gold);display:block;margin:0 auto 1.5rem;outline:6px solid rgba(212,165,90,0.2)}
.hero-name{font-size:30px;font-weight:500;color:var(--gold-light);margin-bottom:.5rem;letter-spacing:.01em}
.hero-title{font-size:14px;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:.35rem;letter-spacing:.04em}
.hero-title-dividers{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:1.25rem}
.hero-title-pill{background:#3a5f5f;border:1px solid #4a8a7a;color:var(--accent);font-size:13px;padding:4px 14px;border-radius:20px;white-space:nowrap}
.hero-title-dot{color:#5a8a7a;font-size:16px}
.hero-badge{display:inline-block;background:rgba(212,165,90,0.15);color:var(--gold-light);font-size:12px;padding:4px 14px;border-radius:20px;margin-bottom:1.25rem;border:1px solid var(--gold-dark)}
.hero h1{font-size:clamp(22px,5vw,36px);font-weight:500;line-height:1.3;margin-bottom:1rem;color:var(--cream)}
.hero h1 em{font-style:normal;color:var(--gold-light)}
.hero p{font-size:16px;color:var(--cream-muted);max-width:540px;margin:0 auto 2rem;line-height:1.75}
.btns{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:.5rem}
.btn-p{display:inline-block;background:var(--gold);color:#1a2e2e;padding:11px 26px;border-radius:24px;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;transition:all .2s}
.btn-p:hover{background:var(--gold-light)}
.btn-o{display:inline-block;background:transparent;color:var(--gold-light);padding:11px 26px;border-radius:24px;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;border:1.5px solid var(--gold-dark);text-decoration:none}
.btn-li{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;background:#0a66c2;color:#fff;padding:11px 22px;border-radius:24px;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;text-decoration:none}
.btn-li svg{width:16px;height:16px;fill:#fff}
.hero-stats{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:2rem;margin-top:2.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.stat-pill .num{font-size:24px;font-weight:500;color:var(--gold-light)}
.stat-pill .lbl{font-size:13px;color:var(--cream-muted);margin-top:2px}
.sl{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:.4rem}
.st{font-size:22px;font-weight:500;color:var(--cream);margin-bottom:.4rem}
.ss{font-size:15px;color:var(--cream-muted);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:1.75rem}
.divider{border:none;border-top:1px solid #4a7070;margin:0}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem}
.acard{background:var(--card);border:1px solid #4a7070;border-radius:12px;padding:1.2rem}
.acard h3{font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--gold-light);margin-bottom:.4rem}
.acard p{font-size:14px;color:var(--cream-muted);line-height:1.65}
.skills-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));gap:10px}
.skill-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid #4a7070;border-radius:10px;padding:.9rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.skill-card:hover,.skill-card.active{border-color:var(--accent);background:var(--card2)}
.skill-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--cream)}
.skill-cat{font-size:12px;color:var(--cream-muted);margin-top:2px}
.skill-bar{height:3px;background:#4a7070;border-radius:2px;margin-top:.65rem;overflow:hidden}
.skill-fill{height:100%;border-radius:2px;background:var(--accent);transition:width .7s ease}
.skill-detail{margin-top:1.25rem;background:var(--card2);border:1px solid #5a8a8a;border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;display:none}
.skill-detail.show{display:block}
.skill-detail h4{font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:.4rem}
.skill-detail p{font-size:14px;color:var(--cream-muted);line-height:1.65}
.timeline{position:relative;padding-left:1.5rem}
.timeline::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:6px;top:0;bottom:0;width:1px;background:#5a8a7a}
.tl-item{position:relative;margin-bottom:2rem}
.tl-dot{position:absolute;left:-1.5rem;top:4px;width:13px;height:13px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold);border:2px solid #2F4F4F}
.tl-meta{font-size:12px;color:var(--cream-muted);margin-bottom:.3rem;display:flex;gap:.5rem;align-items:center}
.tl-badge{background:#3a5f5f;color:var(--accent);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:12px;border:1px solid #4a7a6a}
.tl-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:500;color:var(--cream);margin-bottom:.15rem}
.tl-company{font-size:13px;color:var(--gold-light);margin-bottom:.5rem}
.tl-kpis{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px;margin-bottom:.65rem}
.kpi-chip{background:#3a5050;border:1px solid #4a7070;border-radius:10px;font-size:12px;padding:2px 9px;color:var(--cream-muted)}
.tl-expand{font-size:13px;color:var(--accent);cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline;background:none;border:none}
.tl-bullets{margin-top:.65rem;display:none}
.tl-bullets.show{display:block}
.tl-bullets li{font-size:13px;color:var(--cream-muted);line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:.25rem;margin-left:1rem}
.proj-tabs{display:flex;gap:7px;margin-bottom:1.25rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.proj-tab{padding:6px 14px;border-radius:20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #4a7070;background:transparent;color:var(--cream-muted);transition:all .2s}
.proj-tab.active{background:var(--gold);color:#1a2e2e;border-color:var(--gold)}
.proj-panel{display:none}
.proj-panel.show{display:block}
.proj-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid #4a7070;border-radius:12px;padding:1.2rem}
.proj-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:75px 1fr;gap:.65rem;margin-bottom:.9rem}
.proj-row:last-child{margin-bottom:0}
.proj-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--gold-light);text-transform:uppercase;padding-top:2px}
.proj-content{font-size:14px;color:var(--cream-muted);line-height:1.65}
.proj-result{font-size:14px;color:var(--accent);font-weight:500}
.flow-steps{display:flex;gap:0;padding-bottom:.5rem;overflow-x:auto}
.flow-step{flex:1;min-width:110px;padding:.75rem .6rem;background:var(--card);border:1px solid #4a7070;position:relative;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.flow-step:first-child{border-radius:8px 0 0 8px}
.flow-step:last-child{border-radius:0 8px 8px 0}
.flow-step+.flow-step{border-left:none}
.flow-step:hover,.flow-step.active{background:var(--card2);border-color:var(--accent);z-index:1}
.flow-num{font-size:12px;color:var(--accent);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:3px}
.flow-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--cream)}
.flow-detail{margin-top:.9rem;background:var(--card);border:1px solid #4a7070;border-radius:10px;padding:1rem;font-size:14px;color:var(--cream-muted);line-height:1.7;min-height:55px}
.cert-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:1rem}
.cert-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid #4a7070;border-radius:12px;padding:1.2rem;border-top:3px solid var(--gold)}
.cert-icon{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:#3a5050;border:1px solid var(--gold-dark);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.cert-icon svg{width:18px;height:18px;stroke:var(--gold-light);fill:none;stroke-width:1.8}
.cert-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--gold-light);margin-bottom:.25rem}
.cert-org{font-size:13px;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:.3rem}
.cert-date{font-size:12px;color:var(--cream-muted);margin-bottom:.5rem}
.cert-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--cream-muted);line-height:1.6}
.gallery-filter{display:flex;gap:7px;margin-bottom:1.25rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.gf-btn{padding:6px 14px;border-radius:20px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #4a7070;background:transparent;color:var(--cream-muted);transition:all .2s}
.gf-btn.active{background:var(--accent-dark);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent-dark)}
.gallery-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px}
.gal-item{border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #4a7070;transition:all .2s;background:var(--card2)}
.gal-item:hover{border-color:var(--gold);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.gal-img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/3;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.gal-cap{font-size:12px;color:var(--cream-muted);padding:6px 8px;background:var(--card);line-height:1.4}
.gal-item.hidden{display:none}
.lightbox{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(10,25,25,0.95);z-index:999;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;padding:1rem}
.lightbox.open{display:flex}
.lb-img{max-width:90%;max-height:74vh;border-radius:8px;object-fit:contain;border:1px solid #4a7070}
.lb-cap{margin-top:.75rem;font-size:14px;color:var(--cream-muted);text-align:center;max-width:600px;line-height:1.5}
.lb-close{position:absolute;top:1rem;right:1.25rem;font-size:26px;color:var(--cream-muted);cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;line-height:1}
.lb-nav{display:flex;gap:1rem;margin-top:.75rem}
.lb-btn{background:#3a5f5f;color:var(--cream);border:1px solid #4a7070;border-radius:8px;padding:7px 18px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer}
.lb-btn:hover{background:var(--card2)}
.contact-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--gold-dark);border-radius:12px;padding:2rem;text-align:center;border-top:3px solid var(--gold)}
.contact-card h3{font-size:20px;font-weight:500;color:var(--cream);margin-bottom:.5rem}
.contact-card p{color:var(--cream-muted);margin-bottom:1.5rem;font-size:15px;line-height:1.7}
.contact-links{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:.75rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.contact-link{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:14px;color:var(--gold-light);text-decoration:none;background:#3a5050;padding:9px 18px;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid var(--gold-dark);transition:all .2s}
.contact-link:hover{background:var(--gold);color:#1a2e2e}
.contact-link-li{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:14px;color:#fff;text-decoration:none;background:#0a66c2;padding:9px 18px;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid #085ca8}
.contact-link-li svg{width:15px;height:15px;fill:#fff}
@media(max-width:540px){
  .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .skills-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .gallery-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .hero-avatar{width:130px;height:130px}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <span class="nav-logo">Romelyn Barbadillo</span>
    <div class="nav-links">
      <a href="#about">About</a>
      <a href="#skills">Skills</a>
      <a href="#experience">Experience</a>
      <a href="#certs">Awards</a>
      <a href="#gallery">Gallery</a>
      <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</nav>

<div class="port">

<section class="hero" id="hero">
  <img class="hero-avatar" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Romelyn Barbadillo">
  <div class="hero-name">Romelyn Barbadillo</div>
  <div class="hero-title-dividers">
    <span class="hero-title-pill">Executive Assistant</span>
    <span class="hero-title-dot">&#8226;</span>
    <span class="hero-title-pill">Sales Professional</span>
    <span class="hero-title-dot">&#8226;</span>
    <span class="hero-title-pill">Customer Success Professional</span>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-badge">Open to opportunities &mdash; immediately available</div>
  <h1>I help businesses stay <em>organized,</em><br>efficient, and growing.</h1>
  <p>7+ years turning chaos into clarity &mdash; from healthcare BPO to direct sales leadership and virtual support.</p>
  <div class="btns">
    <a class="btn-p" href="#contact">Let&#39;s work together</a>
    <a class="btn-o" href="#experience">View experience</a>
    <a class="btn-li" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/romelyn-barbadillo-a43248241/?skipRedirect=true" target="_blank">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433a2.062 2.062 0 0 1-2.063-2.065 2.064 2.064 0 1 1 2.063 2.065zm1.782 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z"/></svg>
      LinkedIn
    </a>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-stats">
    <div class="stat-pill"><div class="num">7+</div><div class="lbl">Years experience</div></div>
    <div class="stat-pill"><div class="num">95%+</div><div class="lbl">Resolution rate</div></div>
    <div class="stat-pill"><div class="num">150+</div><div class="lbl">Dealers / month</div></div>
    <div class="stat-pill"><div class="num">5 min</div><div class="lbl">Avg response time</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<hr class="divider">

<section id="about">
  <div class="sl">About me</div>
  <div class="st">The reliable right hand you&#39;ve been looking for</div>
  <div class="ss">From BPO floors in Cebu to leading a sales branch in Dipolog and supporting international clients remotely &mdash; I&#39;ve built a career around showing up, solving problems, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks.</div>
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="acard"><h3>Resilient &amp; adaptable</h3><p>I&#39;ve navigated US healthcare billing, managed 200+ dealer networks, and supported international clients remotely &mdash; pivoting quickly whenever the role demanded it.</p></div>
    <div class="acard"><h3>Detail-driven</h3><p>100% accuracy in daily reports, HIPAA-compliant record-keeping, and CRM data integrity aren&#39;t targets &mdash; they&#39;re habits built over years of high-stakes work.</p></div>
    <div class="acard"><h3>People-first mindset</h3><p>Whether coaching agents, supporting dealers, or responding to clients, I lead with empathy and follow through with results &mdash; earning trust at every level.</p></div>
    <div class="acard"><h3>Remote-ready</h3><p>Experienced with async comms, CRM tools (Zoho, Chatwoot), payment platforms (Braintree, JP Morgan), and maintaining under-5-min response times across time zones.</p></div>
  </div>
</section>

<hr class="divider">

<section id="skills">
  <div class="sl">Skills &amp; tools</div>
  <div class="st">What I bring to every role</div>
  <div class="ss">Click any skill to see proficiency details and real examples.</div>
  <div class="skills-grid" id="skillsGrid"></div>
  <div class="skill-detail" id="skillDetail"></div>
</section>

<hr class="divider">

<section id="experience">
  <div class="sl">Experience</div>
  <div class="st">A track record built on results</div>
  <div class="ss">Click any role to expand the full achievement list.</div>
  <div class="timeline" id="timeline"></div>
</section>

<hr class="divider">

<section id="projects">
  <div class="sl">Case studies</div>
  <div class="st">Problem &#x2192; action &#x2192; result</div>
  <div class="ss">Real challenges I&#39;ve solved across my career.</div>
  <div class="proj-tabs" id="projTabs"></div>
  <div id="projPanels"></div>
</section>

<hr class="divider">

<section id="workflow">
  <div class="sl">How I work</div>
  <div class="st">My daily workflow as an EA</div>
  <div class="ss">Click each step to see how I approach it.</div>
  <div class="flow-steps" id="flowSteps"></div>
  <div class="flow-detail" id="flowDetail">Select a step above to learn more.</div>
</section>

<hr class="divider">

<section id="certs">
  <div class="sl">Awards &amp; recognition</div>
  <div class="st">Certified achievements</div>
  <div class="ss">Recognition earned across roles &mdash; for sales excellence, recruitment, and leadership performance.</div>
  <div class="cert-grid" id="certGrid"></div>
</section>

<hr class="divider">

<section id="gallery">
  <div class="sl">Photo gallery</div>
  <div class="st">Moments from my career</div>
  <div class="ss">Click any photo to view it larger. Use the filters to browse by category.</div>
  <div class="gallery-filter" id="galleryFilter"></div>
  <div class="gallery-grid" id="galleryGrid"></div>
</section>

<hr class="divider">

<section id="contact">
  <div class="contact-card">
    <h3>Ready to make your work easier?</h3>
    <p>I&#39;m immediately available and excited to contribute to a team that values organization, reliability, and proactive support.</p>
    <div class="contact-links">
      <a class="contact-link" href="mailto:romelynbarbadillo@gmail.com">&#9993; romelynbarbadillo@gmail.com</a>
      <a class="contact-link" href="tel:+639776706256">&#128222; +63 977 670 6256</a>
      <a class="contact-link-li" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/romelyn-barbadillo-a43248241/?skipRedirect=true" target="_blank">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433a2.062 2.062 0 0 1-2.063-2.065 2.064 2.064 0 1 1 2.063 2.065zm1.782 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z"/></svg>
        LinkedIn Profile
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

</div>

<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox">
  <button class="lb-close" onclick="closeLb()">&#10005;</button>
  <img class="lb-img" id="lbImg" src="" alt="">
  <div class="lb-cap" id="lbCap"></div>
  <div class="lb-nav">
    <button class="lb-btn" onclick="lbNav(-1)">&#8592; Prev</button>
    <button class="lb-btn" onclick="lbNav(1)">Next &#8594;</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const skills=[
  {name:'CRM management',cat:'Customer tools',pct:95,detail:'Expert in Zoho CRM and Chatwoot. Maintained high-accuracy records for 200+ dealers, managed lead pipelines, and updated customer data daily as a VA for international clients.'},
  {name:'Email & calendar',cat:'Executive support',pct:90,detail:'Managed high-volume inboxes via Outlook, Gmail, and Microsoft Teams. Achieved under-5-minute average response times while ensuring accuracy and professionalism.'},
  {name:'Payment processing',cat:'Finance ops',pct:88,detail:'Generated 10-20 payment links daily using Braintree and JP Morgan. Processed insurance premium payments and reinstatements with 100% compliance.'},
  {name:'Reporting & Excel',cat:'Data & analytics',pct:85,detail:'Tracked branch sales KPIs using iCheck, Excel, and BMS dashboards. Maintained 100% accurate daily activity reports and presented performance data in weekly briefings.'},
  {name:'Team leadership',cat:'People ops',pct:90,detail:'Led teams of 1-10 agents at Wipro, contributing to a 10-15% quality score improvement. Managed incentive programs and coached team members to measurable results.'},
  {name:'HIPAA compliance',cat:'Healthcare',pct:98,detail:'5 years of strict HIPAA compliance handling US health insurance data at Wipro Philippines. Zero data breach incidents throughout entire tenure.'},
  {name:'Dealer recruitment',cat:'Sales ops',pct:92,detail:'Recruited and onboarded 99-150 new dealers monthly at Personal Collection through strategic outreach and structured onboarding events.'},
  {name:'Customer resolution',cat:'Service',pct:95,detail:'Maintained a 95%+ first-call resolution rate across healthcare and retail. Reduced repeat issues by identifying patterns and recommending process improvements.'},
];
const sg=document.getElementById('skillsGrid'),sd=document.getElementById('skillDetail');
skills.forEach(s=>{
  const d=document.createElement('div');
  d.className='skill-card';
  d.innerHTML=`<div class="skill-name">${s.name}</div><div class="skill-cat">${s.cat}</div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" style="width:0%" data-pct="${s.pct}"></div></div>`;
  d.onclick=()=>{
    document.querySelectorAll('.skill-card').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active'));
    d.classList.add('active');
    sd.innerHTML=`<h4>${s.name} — ${s.pct}% proficiency</h4><p>${s.detail}</p>`;
    sd.className='skill-detail show';
  };
  sg.appendChild(d);
});
setTimeout(()=>document.querySelectorAll('.skill-fill').forEach(f=>f.style.width=f.dataset.pct+'%'),400);

const jobs=[
  {period:'Nov 2025 - Feb 2026',badge:'Virtual Assistance',title:'Freelance Virtual Assistant',company:'Remote / International clients',kpis:['<5 min response','10-20 payment links/day','Zoho, Chatwoot, Braintree'],bullets:['Managed customer communications via email, WhatsApp, and phone across time zones','Generated 10-20 payment links daily using Braintree and JP Morgan with full accuracy','Coordinated airport meet-and-greet scheduling and CRM data updates','Maintained strict client data confidentiality at all times']},
  {period:'Apr 2024 - Jun 2025',badge:'Sales leadership',title:'Sales Supervisor / Dreams Fulfillment Officer',company:'Personal Collection Direct Selling Inc. — Dipolog',kpis:['150 new dealers/mo','95%+ resolution rate','200+ active dealers'],bullets:['Managed 20+ products across cosmetics, personal care, baby care, and home care','Recruited and onboarded 99-150 new dealers monthly through outreach and events','Resolved dealer concerns with 95%+ resolution rate using empathy and problem-solving','Conducted weekly training sessions and presented performance reports','Performed 30-50 daily outbound calls for follow-ups and relationship management','Awarded Highest YTD Sales and Highest Recruitment Count — Cluster 15']},
  {period:'Jan 2019 - Jan 2024',badge:'BPO / Healthcare',title:'Customer Care Representative & Team Leader',company:'Wipro Philippines — Cebu City',kpis:['50-75 calls/day','95%+ FCR','HIPAA compliant'],bullets:['Handled 50-75 inbound calls daily on health insurance billing, payments, and enrollment','Facilitated reinstatement of 20-30 insurance policies weekly','Contributed to 10-15% quality score improvement through audit analysis','Managed team incentive programs for 1-10 agents']},
  {period:'Oct 2016 - Dec 2016',badge:'Retail BPO',title:'Customer Service Representative',company:'TeleTech (Amazon) — Sta. Rosa, Laguna',kpis:['30-85 interactions/day','90-95% resolution','30-50 orders/day'],bullets:['Handled orders, returns, refunds, and product inquiries across phone and email','Coordinated with delivery partners to ensure accurate fulfillment','Identified repeat issue patterns and shared insights to improve service delivery']},
];
const tl=document.getElementById('timeline');
jobs.forEach(j=>{
  const div=document.createElement('div');
  div.className='tl-item';
  div.innerHTML=`<div class="tl-dot"></div><div class="tl-meta"><span>${j.period}</span><span class="tl-badge">${j.badge}</span></div><div class="tl-title">${j.title}</div><div class="tl-company">${j.company}</div><div class="tl-kpis">${j.kpis.map(k=>`<span class="kpi-chip">${k}</span>`).join('')}</div><button class="tl-expand" onclick="toggleB(this)">Show details</button><ul class="tl-bullets">${j.bullets.map(b=>`<li>${b}</li>`).join('')}</ul>`;
  tl.appendChild(div);
});
function toggleB(btn){const ul=btn.nextElementSibling;const s=ul.classList.toggle('show');btn.textContent=s?'Hide details':'Show details';}

const projects=[
  {tab:'Policy reinstatement',prob:'Members were losing health coverage due to lapsed premiums and complex reinstatement processes, causing frustration and repeat calls.',action:'Guided members step-by-step through verification and payment processes using empathetic communication to resolve in a single interaction.',result:'Reinstated 20-30 policies weekly with a 95%+ first-call resolution rate — reducing escalations and improving satisfaction scores.'},
  {tab:'Dealer recruitment',prob:'Branch needed to hit aggressive monthly growth targets with limited staff and a competitive direct-selling market in Dipolog.',action:'Designed a structured outreach and onboarding system, organized recruitment events, and delivered personalized pitches highlighting earning potential.',result:'Consistently onboarded 99-150 new dealers per month. Awarded Highest Recruitment Count for Cluster 15 in 2025.'},
  {tab:'CRM & ops updates',prob:'Client operations depended on an always-current CRM — outdated records led to missed follow-ups, double bookings, and gaps in service delivery that damaged client confidence.',action:'Established a disciplined real-time update routine: logging every customer interaction, appointment, payment status, and service request immediately after completion. Set daily review checkpoints to audit records for completeness and flag anything requiring follow-up before end of day.',result:'Achieved zero missed follow-ups and zero booking conflicts throughout the engagement. CRM accuracy remained at 100%, giving the client full visibility into every account at any moment.'},
  {tab:'Quality improvement',prob:'Team quality scores at Wipro were below target, with recurring compliance gaps surfacing in monthly audits.',action:'Analyzed audit results, identified root causes of repeat errors, and introduced targeted coaching sessions with structured feedback loops.',result:'Contributed to a 10-15% increase in quality scores over the following review period.'},
];
const pt=document.getElementById('projTabs'),pp=document.getElementById('projPanels');
projects.forEach((p,i)=>{
  const tab=document.createElement('button');
  tab.className='proj-tab'+(i===0?' active':'');
  tab.textContent=p.tab;
  tab.onclick=()=>{
    document.querySelectorAll('.proj-tab').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.proj-panel').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('show'));
    tab.classList.add('active');
    document.getElementById('pp'+i).classList.add('show');
  };
  pt.appendChild(tab);
  const panel=document.createElement('div');
  panel.className='proj-panel'+(i===0?' show':'');
  panel.id='pp'+i;
  panel.innerHTML=`<div class="proj-card"><div class="proj-row"><div class="proj-label">Problem</div><div class="proj-content">${p.prob}</div></div><div class="proj-row"><div class="proj-label">Action</div><div class="proj-content">${p.action}</div></div><div class="proj-row"><div class="proj-label">Result</div><div class="proj-result">${p.result}</div></div></div>`;
  pp.appendChild(panel);
});

const flows=[
  {name:'Start of day',detail:'Review overnight messages and sort by urgency. Flag anything time-sensitive. Update the priority list in the CRM and block calendar time for deep-work tasks.'},
  {name:'Communications',detail:'Process all inbound emails and messages. Respond to routine inquiries within 5 minutes. Draft responses for anything requiring approval and queue them for review.'},
  {name:'Task execution',detail:'Work through prioritized tasks: scheduling, payment processing, CRM updates, report generation. Batch similar tasks to maximize efficiency.'},
  {name:'Check-ins',detail:'Mid-day sync with stakeholders or team leads. Surface blockers early. Confirm appointments and follow up on pending items before end of business.'},
  {name:'Wrap-up',detail:"Update CRM records, file reports, log daily activity, and prepare a handoff note. Set tomorrow's priority list so the next day starts with zero confusion."},
];
const fs=document.getElementById('flowSteps'),fd=document.getElementById('flowDetail');
flows.forEach((f,i)=>{
  const div=document.createElement('div');
  div.className='flow-step';
  div.innerHTML=`<div class="flow-num">0${i+1}</div><div class="flow-name">${f.name}</div>`;
  div.onclick=()=>{
    document.querySelectorAll('.flow-step').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));
    div.classList.add('active');
    fd.textContent=f.detail;
  };
  fs.appendChild(div);
});

const certs=[
  {title:'Highest YTD Sales Achievement',org:'Personal Collection Direct Selling Inc.',date:'January 4, 2025 — Initao, Misamis Oriental',desc:'Awarded to DFO Romelyn Barbadillo (Dipolog Branch) for Highest Year-to-Date Sales Achievement of Cluster 15.'},
  {title:'Highest Recruitment Count',org:'Personal Collection Direct Selling Inc.',date:'January 4, 2025 — Initao, Misamis Oriental',desc:'Awarded for achieving the Highest Number of Recruitment Count for Cluster 15 — consistently onboarding 99-150 new dealers per month.'},
  {title:'Top Dealer Penetration Rate — TUFF TBC',org:'Personal Collection / Mindanao 1 Region',date:'January 13, 2025 — Dusit Thani, Davao',desc:'Certificate of Appreciation for Top Dealer Penetration Rate for TUFF Toilet Bowl Cleanser. Presented to Dipolog Branch (Mindanao 1). Signed by CEO & CMO Cherish C. Tupaz.'},
  {title:'Financial Wellness Caravan Speaker',org:'PC Dipolog Branch',date:'July 5, 2024 — Dipolog City',desc:'Featured presenter at the Financial Wellness Caravan as Dreams Fulfillment Officer, delivering sessions on product knowledge, dealer growth, and financial wellness.'},
  {title:'Cluster 15 Top Performance',org:'Personal Collection Direct Selling Inc.',date:'2024-2025',desc:'Recognized alongside Branch Manager Antonette Azucenas for outstanding overall branch performance in sales, recruitment, and dealer retention.'},
  {title:'5 Years HIPAA Compliance Excellence',org:'Wipro Philippines',date:'Jan 2019 - Jan 2024',desc:'Maintained 100% compliance with US healthcare insurance regulations and HIPAA standards across 5 years. Zero data breach incidents throughout tenure.'},
];
const cg=document.getElementById('certGrid');
const starSvg=`<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polygon points="12,2 15.09,8.26 22,9.27 17,14.14 18.18,21.02 12,17.77 5.82,21.02 7,14.14 2,9.27 8.91,8.26"/></svg>`;
certs.forEach(c=>{
  const div=document.createElement('div');
  div.className='cert-card';
  div.innerHTML=`<div class="cert-icon">${starSvg}</div><div class="cert-title">${c.title}</div><div class="cert-org">${c.org}</div><div class="cert-date">${c.date}</div><div class="cert-desc">${c.desc}</div>`;
  cg.appendChild(div);
});

const photos=[{"src":"data:image/jpeg;base64,", "cap":"Christmas appreciation event with dealers — PC Dipolog Branch", "cat":"Events"},{"src":"data:image/jpeg;base64,", "cap":"Financial Wellness Caravan — presenting as Dreams Fulfillment Officer, Dipolog City (Jul 2024)", "cat":"Events"},{"src":"data:image/jpeg;base64,", "cap":"Mindanao 1 regional team — Mission Smart Start convention", "cat":"Team"},{"src":"data:image/jpeg;base64,", "cap":"Life Made Great convention — Dipolog team on stage", "cat":"Team"},{"src":"data:image/jpeg;base64,", "cap":"Certificate of Appreciation — Top Dealer Penetration Rate for TUFF TBC, Mindanao 1 (Jan 2025)", "cat":"Awards"},{"src":"data:image/jpeg;base64,", "cap":"New dealer recruitment — Dipolog City branch office (Feb 2025)", "cat":"Recruitment"},{"src":"data:image/jpeg;base64,", "cap":"Dipolog Branch receiving Top Dealer award on stage — Dusit Thani, Davao (Jan 2025)", "cat":"Awards"},{"src":"data:image/jpeg;base64,", "cap":"Certificates of Recognition — Highest YTD Sales & Highest Recruitment Count, Cluster 15 (Jan 2025)", "cat":"Awards"},{"src":"data:image/jpeg;base64,", "cap":"Certificate of Recognition — Highest YTD Sales Achievement, Cluster 15 (Jan 4, 2025)", "cat":"Awards"},{"src":"data:image/jpeg;base64,", "cap":"Cluster 15 recognition ceremony — Dipolog Branch with Antonette Azucenas & Romelyn Barbadillo", "cat":"Awards"},{"src":"data:image/jpeg;base64,", "cap":"Dealer recruitment — new recruits onboarded, Dipolog City branch (Jan 2025)", "cat":"Recruitment"},{"src":"data:image/jpeg;base64,", "cap":"PC Dipolog team — Mission Call at the branch office (Apr 2025)", "cat":"Team"}];
const cats=['All',...new Set(photos.map(p=>p.cat))];
const gfDiv=document.getElementById('galleryFilter'),gg=document.getElementById('galleryGrid');
let lbIndex=0;
cats.forEach(cat=>{
  const btn=document.createElement('button');
  btn.className='gf-btn'+(cat==='All'?' active':'');
  btn.textContent=cat;
  btn.onclick=()=>{
    document.querySelectorAll('.gf-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    document.querySelectorAll('.gal-item').forEach(el=>{
      el.classList.toggle('hidden',cat!=='All'&&el.dataset.cat!==cat);
    });
  };
  gfDiv.appendChild(btn);
});
photos.forEach((p,i)=>{
  const div=document.createElement('div');
  div.className='gal-item';
  div.dataset.cat=p.cat;
  div.innerHTML=`<img class="gal-img" src="${p.src}" alt="${p.cap}"><div class="gal-cap">${p.cap}</div>`;
  div.onclick=()=>openLb(i);
  gg.appendChild(div);
});
function openLb(i){lbIndex=i;document.getElementById('lbImg').src=photos[i].src;document.getElementById('lbCap').textContent=photos[i].cap;document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('open');}
function closeLb(){document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('open');}
function lbNav(dir){lbIndex=(lbIndex+dir+photos.length)%photos.length;document.getElementById('lbImg').src=photos[lbIndex].src;document.getElementById('lbCap').textContent=photos[lbIndex].cap;}
document.getElementById('lightbox').onclick=function(e){if(e.target===this)closeLb();};
</script>
</body>
</html>
